subject: A large dark furry creature delivering a heavy blow to a smaller pale-wrapped figure that emits glowing butterflies on impact
description: A massive dark creature with a skull-like face and shaggy fur strikes a blow against a smaller figure. The attacker is large, hunched, and covered in dark fur or hair, with the skeletal suggestion of a face — pale and hollow. Its extended arm connects with the smaller figure. The struck figure is smaller, wrapped in pale grey cloth or wrappings, bald or close-cropped. On impact, glowing pale-yellow butterflies or spirits scatter outward from the point of contact, suggesting either soul or magical energy being knocked free. The background is a fiery red-orange room interior, suggesting a burning structure or hellish environment.
foreground: Large furry skull-faced creature striking a pale-wrapped smaller figure; butterflies erupting from impact
emotion: brutal impact — the attacker is fully committed, the smaller figure is being overwhelmed
